title: Sick
original_title: Sick: The Life and Death of Bob Flanagan, Supermasochist
overview: The story of Robert Flanagan, a man who was born with cystic fibrosis and told he wouldn't live past 20, who through a unique odyssey of masochism, art and love found a way to live decades past his expiration date.
